description:
Both enums are defined in two crates with different serde and variants:

RequirementType:
- protocol/src/daemon.rs:39 — { Functional, NonFunctional, Technical, Product } with serde(rename_all = "lowercase")
- orchestrator-core/src/types.rs:422 — { Product, Functional, NonFunctional, Technical, Other } with serde(rename_all = "kebab-case") and extra Other variant

RequirementPriority:
- protocol/src/common.rs:37 — { Must, Should, Could, Wont }
- orchestrator-core/src/types.rs:383 — { Must, #[default] Should, Could, Wont } with Default derive

These have different serde serializations for the same semantic concept, causing wire-format divergence. Solution: Pick one location (protocol or core), consolidate, and delete the duplicate.
title: Consolidate RequirementType and RequirementPriority enums (protocol vs core duplication)
